title: <div><font face=".AppleColorEmojiUI">📅</font> Present (At Time of Text): The ri
content:
📅 Present (At Time of Text): The rise of psychological asylums (1800s) & new fears of insanity.
📅 Post-Publication Echo: The “Satanic Panic” (1980s) → Public hysteria over hidden evils.
📅 Future Projection: AI-driven “moral purity tests” replacing human judgment in legal cases.

✅ Why This Works:
• Frames literature as a conversation between past, present, and future.
• Encourages students to see recurring themes in history.
• Provides an optional creative writing tie-in (future projection).

📜 6. Final Questions Before Locking Version 4.5

1. Should students be able to switch archetypes mid-semester?

✔ They can, but only once, and they lose half their XP in the process.
✔ They must submit a justification essay explaining the switch.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 45 (chunk 45/555)
